Legal DocumentLast Updated: April 14, 2026

Privacy
Policy

Transparent protocols on how we handle, protect, and respect your personal information at ComplaineNepal.

01. Introduction

This Privacy Policy describes Our policies and procedures on the collection, use and disclosure of Your information when You use the Service and tells You about Your privacy rights and how the law protects You.

We use Your Personal Data to provide and improve the Service. By using the Service, You agree to the collection and use of information in accordance with this Privacy Policy.

02. Definitions

Account

A unique account created for You to access our Service or parts of our Service.

Company

Refers to complainnepal, our organization in Nepal.

Cookies

Small files placed on Your device containing browsing history and usage details.

Personal Data

Any information that relates to an identified or identifiable individual.

Service

Refers to the Website accessible from complainnepal.com.

Device

Any device that can access the Service such as a computer or mobile phone.

03. Data Collection

Personal Identifiable Information

  • Email Address
  • First and Last Name
  • Phone Number
  • Usage Statistics

Tracking & Cookies

We use Cookies and similar tracking technologies to track activity and store certain info. This includes beacons, tags, and scripts to analyze our Service.

Necessary CookiesFunctionality Cookies

Data Retention

We retain your Personal Data only for as long as necessary. User Accounts are typically retained for the duration of the relationship plus up to 24 months after closure.

Support Tickets

Retained up to 24 months from closure.

Usage Logs

Security logs processed for 24 months.

04. Contact Infomation

If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, your data rights, or our security protocols, please reach out to our legal department.

Email Support

offgridhqteam@gmail.com

End of Privacy Policy for complainnepal
